query.description: Show total count in the response.

An ordering filter that orders the results by column name.

Available operators:

asc - ascending
desc - descending
Limit the number of elements to return in one page.
Show only backups located in vaults of the storage that is identified by specified storage ID.
Show only backups for specified agent.
Show only backups of specified resource type.
ID of vault to search archives for.
Show only backups created or deleted within specified time range.
Show only backups updated within specified time range.
Show only backups located in vaults of specified storage types.

Show only backups in archives with forensic data or without forensic.

If not specified, backups are listed regardless of forensic data.
Show only backups for specified resources.
Show only backups for specified change tag.

A flag that specifies what should be added to the list of returned backups:

1 - All deleted backups are added to the list of backups.
2 - Only deleted backups are added to the list of backups.
0 - No deleted backups are added to the list of backups.

An array of field names to include in the response.

Each value represents the name of the extension field to be included in the base response.
Show only backups created within specified time range.

Show only backups in protected by password or unprotected by password archives.

If not specified, backups are listed regardless of their password protection status.
Show only backups of specified types.
Show only backups for specified tapes.
Show a list of Backups triggered by specified reason.
Show only backups scanned within the specified time range OR never scanned backups if "none" is specified.
Show only backups with specified Vulnerability Assessment Result Statuses
Show only backups with specified Malware Assessment Result statuses.
Calculate and include possible actions in the response.
Select target agent to calculate actions.
Base64-encoded token obtained from the previous response. Points to the end of the page.
Base64-encoded token obtained from the previous response. Points to the start of the page.
The number of elements to skip before beginning to return elements.

Show a list of archives of specified archive IDs.

A flag that specifies what should be added to the list of returned archives:

1 - All deleted archives are added to the list of archives.
2 - Only deleted archives marked as immutable are added to the list of archives.
0 - No deleted archives are added to the list of archives.

Include additional information about archive.

If false or not specified, the stats field will not be in the response data.

Show only archives that contain backups for at least one resource from the specified list.
Show a list of Archives in vaults of specified storage types.
Show a list of Archives of specified types.
Show a list of Archives of specified formats.
Show only archives created by backup plan with specified ID.
Show only archives created by centralized plan with specified ID.

Include cataloged status of archive.

If false or not specified, cataloged_status and actions fields will not be incuded in the response data.

Show only archives with forensic data or without forensic.

If not specified, archives are listed regardless of forensic data.

Include pre-patch management status of archive.

If false or not specified, the pre_patch_management field will not be included in the response data.

Show only archives with at least one backup which was made before patch management.

If false or not specified, archives are listed regardless of this filter.

Include malware assessment result of backups in the archive.

If false or not specified, the malware_found field will not be included in the response data.

Show only archives with backups that have the specified malware status.

Possible malware statuses:

notScanned - No backups were scanned in the archive.
clean - Backups that don't contain malware.
malware - Backups that contain malware.
